explain.wenwen.magic_mirror_1: §aWhen you die, the Magic Mirror shatters and disappears, and the released energy teleports your dropped items back to your respawn point (only works in the Overworld)
death.attack.wenwen.true_damage.player: %1$s was killed by true damage while fighting %2$s
message.wenwen.XP: At least 2 levels are required to teleport!
message.wenwen.fail: Reduce the creature's health to below 25%!
message.wenwen.lock_chest: §cChest is locked. Right-click while holding a §bKey§c to unlock!

advancements.wenwen.fear.description: It seems something terrible is nearby
enchantment.wenwen.damage_multiplier.des: Higher enchantment level deals more damage
enchantment.wenwen.beheaded.desc: Instantly kills targets below a certain health threshold (higher level raises threshold)
enchantment.wenwen.distance.desc: True marksmen understand the value of distance, taking heads from a thousand miles away. The farther you are, the deadlier your arrows.
enchantment.wenwen.killer.desc: Deals extra damage to all hostile mobs, but with a lower bonus percentage
enchantment.wenwen.lenient.desc: A gentle blade leaves a gentle heart
enchantment.wenwen.unbreak.desc: Prevents the item from being destroyed
enchantment.wenwen.mingdao.desc: When taking fatal damage, negates that damage and grants temporary invincibility for (3 + enchantment level) seconds. Triggers once every 120 seconds; higher levels reduce cooldown
enchantment.wenwen.fortune.desc: Extra drops when mining (rarely triggers a great harvest with massively increased drops; higher levels increase chance)
enchantment.wenwen.purge.desc: Reduces mining penalties (e.g., mining blocks in air or water)
enchantment.wenwen.berserker.desc: Deals extra damage on critical hits (higher level increases damage)
enchantment.wenwen.dehp.desc: Reduces the target's healing by 50% after dealing damage (higher level increases duration)
enchantment.wenwen.penetrate.desc: Reduces target armor based on enchantment level (effect doubled for ranged weapons)
enchantment.wenwen.arrow.desc: Applies a Mark effect on hit (Marked: target takes 50% more damage while affected)
enchantment.wenwen.armor.desc: Increases the armor value provided by the equipment (higher level gives more armor)
enchantment.wenwen.save.desc: Prevents the item from dropping upon death
enchantment.wenwen.health.desc: Increases the wearer's maximum health (higher level increases the bonus)
enchantment.wenwen.drop.desc: Chance to double drops when killing a creature (higher level increases chance)
enchantment.wenwen.egg.desc: Chance to drop the corresponding spawn egg when killing a creature (higher level increases chance)
enchantment.wenwen.dragon_killer.desc: Deals extra damage to all dragon-type creatures based on their max health (higher level increases damage)
enchantment.wenwen.pig_killer.desc: Deals extra damage to all piglin creatures based on their max health (higher level increases damage)
enchantment.wenwen.purify.desc: Attacking a zombie villager has a chance to cure it; deals massive damage to zombies (higher level increases cure chance)
enchantment.wenwen.xp_damage.desc: Higher player level deals more damage
